name: Snyk Security
description: Easily find and fix security issues in your applications leveraging Snyk platform capabilities.
long_description:
Snyk MCP enables AI assistants to perform comprehensive security scanning on code, dependencies, infrastructure, and containers. Integrate Snyk's security capabilities directly into your AI-assisted development workflow to proactively identify and fix vulnerabilities during code generation and review.

Supported scanning types:
- **SAST (Static Application Security Testing)**: Analyze source code for security vulnerabilities
- **SCA (Software Composition Analysis)**: Detect vulnerabilities in open source dependencies
- **IaC (Infrastructure as Code)**: Find security misconfigurations in cloud infrastructure
- **Container Security**: Scan container images for vulnerabilities
- **SBOM/AIBOM**: Generate and test Software/AI Bills of Materials

snyk_token.title: Snyk API Token
snyk_token.description: Optional. Authenticate interactively using the snyk_auth tool (recommended), or paste your Snyk API token from https://app.snyk.io/account as a fallback.

tools.name: snyk_version
tools.description: Displays the installed Snyk CLI version.

tools.name: snyk_auth
tools.description: Authenticates the user with Snyk by storing an API token locally.

tools.name: snyk_logout
tools.description: Logs out of the current Snyk account by clearing the locally stored authentication token.

tools.name: snyk_trust
tools.description: Trusts a given folder to allow Snyk to scan it.

tools.name: snyk_code_scan
tools.description: Performs Static Application Security Testing (SAST) by analyzing source code to identify security vulnerabilities without executing the code.

tools.name: snyk_sca_scan
tools.description: Analyzes projects for open-source vulnerabilities and license compliance issues by inspecting manifest files to understand dependencies and querying the Snyk vulnerability database.

tools.name: snyk_iac_scan
tools.description: Analyzes Infrastructure as Code (IaC) files for security misconfigurations across Terraform, Kubernetes, CloudFormation, and ARM templates.

tools.name: snyk_container_scan
tools.description: Scans container images for known vulnerabilities in OS packages and application dependencies.

tools.name: snyk_sbom_scan
tools.description: Analyzes an existing SBOM file for known vulnerabilities in its open-source components.

tools.name: snyk_aibom
tools.description: Generates an AI Bill of Materials (AIBOM) for Python software projects in CycloneDX format, identifying AI models, datasets, and tools.

tools.name: snyk_send_feedback
tools.description: Reports the delta of Snyk issues prevented or fixed during a session for tracking security improvements.

prompts.name: security_code_review
prompts.text: Use the snyk_code_scan tool to scan ${arguments.path} for security vulnerabilities. Identify any issues found and suggest fixes.

prompts.name: scan_dependencies
prompts.description: Scan project dependencies for security vulnerabilities
prompts.text: Use the snyk_sca_scan tool to scan ${arguments.path} for dependency vulnerabilities. Report any critical or high severity issues found.

prompts.name: fix_vulnerabilities
prompts.description: Scan and fix security vulnerabilities in the project
prompts.text: Use the snyk_code_scan and snyk_sca_scan tools to scan ${arguments.path} for security vulnerabilities, then automatically fix any issues that have available remediation.
